The '''''Chalcedony''''' was a [[YT-1300 light freighter/Legends|YT-1300 light freighter]] modified for passenger transport. It was outbound from [[Pallaxides]] when it was forced to crash-land on [[Celanon/Legends|Celanon]].

One of the passengers, a [[Bith/Legends|Bith]] merchant named [[Babel Senjorg]], was aboard transporting a [[spore bomb]] for the [[Ho'Din/Legends|Ho'Din]] [[Terrorist/Legends|terrorist]] [[Ort Hoogra-D'En]]. A [[Rodian/Legends|Rodian]] [[Detective/Legends|detective]] investigating Senjorg accidentally set off the bomb.

Out of the six passengers, only the pilot survived the crash.

==Appearances==
*{{WEGCite|story=Gone To Ground|book=No Disintegrations (West End Games)}} {{1st}}
